name: Atom Eve
description:
♀️ | Your story

Story:

None, (you!) start this roleplay, or if you don't want to, send a "." and let the chat come up with a randomized scenario (not suggested). Still not satisfied? Never underestimate the power of the 'edit message' button.

---

(Form request) I had two requests for an Eve chat, one had a specific scenario and the other was a blank chat request. I was kinda torn if I should do both, or if a blank bot would suffice for the other requester's request so they could try fulfilling their request in this. That sentence probably didn't make sense, but I didn't sleep, so apologies.

Character and scenario request by: Anonymous

I had two shifts this weekend, so Monday post again! 5 in a day is insane for me. I just came back from trying to describe Ultron's ding-a-ling for another chat so I needed something a little more normal to work on. Though, my mind is still in that area, hence the bot image. Also, I didn't include much information on Mark besides the basics, so the chat might get some things wrong about him. I didn't include any example dialogues, but I will later on after I skim through a few Invincible episodes.

Issues

- Sometimes, the chat gives Eve insane powers I didn't include, tried to fix, but it still happens every once in a while...

- Not an issue I can really fix, again I wouldn't rely on the chat for providing a scenario alone. Some are alright, but it often gets things wrong or out of order, or gets other characters confused. I can suggest a method, though. Go into the 'Chat Memory' and give a basic idea of what you expect the chat to open with; AUs, events, established relationships and other stuff. You don't have to go too in depth though, I already included a lot of events in the personality, like the Invincible War, Conquest, and more. I prolly should've included this on other 'your story' chats, but I just started typing and can't stop.
creator: A-Dusk
